summary: Iter 206 frontend-only verification of Punch Approvals overhaul (new column layout + per-row search bar + OT (+1) cross-day stitching) against public preview URL as super admin (password login → llc_session_token). Focused on tabs main agent flagged (Pending / Updated / Manual / search edge cases / extra-duty live total / Import Excel regression), also revalidated Approved & Auto-Punches. Seed data (SURENDRA SINGH code 50, Kankani, 2026-07-20 IN 08:00 / OUT 20:00 / OT-IN 20:07 / OT-OUT 07:59 next day) was NOT touched, no Save actions committed. RESULTS: 7/8 review-request items PASS end-to-end, 1 item (Pending empty-state) partially deviates from spec (empty state renders WITHOUT the table headers). (1) Pending tab: opens without crash, but when the day has no pending rows, headers are hidden and only the 'No pending punches' empty-state renders — the Updated tab does show headers + empty message on the same date, so the two tabs are inconsistent (minor UX nit, not a functional bug). (2) Approved tab: SURENDRA row exact match — 50 · SURENDRA SINGH · RAM SINGH · GREY CHE... · 08:00 am (20 Jul 2026) · 08:00 pm (20 Jul 2026) · 08:07 pm (20 Jul 2026) · 07:59 am with amber '21 Jul 2026 (+1)' · Duty 12:00 · Total 23:52 · Excel punch import. All new column headers present (Action intentionally hidden on Approved/Rejected per code line 1578 canAct && tab!=='approved'). (3) Search bar (pa-search): typing 'SURENDRA' keeps row; typing 'ZZZZ' clears rows and shows 'No rows match your search' empty-state; pa-search-clear button restores rows. Verified on Approved and Auto-Punches tabs. (4) Auto-Punches tab: SURENDRA row shows editable In/Out inputs (08:00 / 20:00 with 20 Jul 2026 subtitle), read-only OT In 20:07 (20 Jul 2026) / OT Out 07:59 with amber '21 Jul 2026 (+1)', Duty 12:00, Total 23:52, Update Reason picker ('Due to Mismatch' default), Save button. No Date or Status column, no leading Code/Status column pair — clean. (5) Manual Entries tab: renders many rows for employees with missing punches (AFZAL HUSSAIN, AJAB SINGH, AJAY KUMAR, AJAY SINGH RAWAT, etc.), OT In / OT Out columns render as '—' (em dash), no crash. All new headers present. (6) Updated tab: no updated rows for the day but headers render (Code / Name / Father Name / Designation / In / Date / Out / Date / OT In / Date / OT Out / Date / Duty HRS / Total Duty HRS / Update Details (Punch · Reason · By)) + empty-state message 'No updated punches for 2026-07-20'. (7) Additional Duty tab: SURENDRA row with In 08:00 (20 Jul 2026), Out 20:00 (20 Jul 2026), OT In 20:07 (20 Jul 2026), OT Out 07:59 with amber '21 Jul 2026 (+1)', Duty HRS 12:00, Total HRS 23:52. Typing 1 into xd-hrs- input LIVE-UPDATES Total HRS to 24:52 ✓ (reset to 0 after test, Save never pressed). (8) Import Excel modal: 'pa-import-excel' opens PunchImportModal, 'pimp-pick' Choose Excel file button visible; closed cleanly via ESC. No red screens, no navigation crashes, only the recurring RN-web cosmetic console warnings (outline/background/padding '0 8px' — carried forward from iter 202/204/205). No changes made to code.

ui_bugs.issue: When Pending tab has no rows for the selected date, the table header row is NOT rendered — only the 'No pending punches' empty-state card is shown. Other empty tabs (e.g. Updated) do render the headers + empty message, so behavior is inconsistent. Review-request line 3 requested 'verify headers render' even when empty. Reference: /app/frontend/app/punch-approvals.tsx around the pending branch (early return to empty-state before the Table headers render). Priority: LOW / cosmetic — no functional impact, batch-approvals still work.

issues: Recurring RN-web console noise: 'Invalid style property of outline / background' and shorthand padding '0 8px'. Same as iter 202/204/205 — cosmetic.

action_items: OPTIONAL / LOW-PRIORITY: In punch-approvals.tsx Pending tab, render the new table header row even when there are 0 pending punches for the selected date (mirror the Updated tab behavior) so the empty-state also documents the new column layout to the user. All other tabs already behave correctly.
OPTIONAL: sanitize RN-web shorthand style warnings (outline / background / padding '0 8px') — pending across last 4 iterations, non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: punch-approvals.tsx is 2486 lines — approaching the 700-line ceiling threshold in the code review guidelines. Consider splitting per-tab renderers (Approved / Auto / Manual / Updated / Extra / Pending) into their own components in /app/frontend/src/screens/punch-approvals/ to make future column changes localized. (Same feedback as prior iterations.)

Action column is intentionally hidden on Approved/Rejected tabs via `canAct && tab !== 'approved' && tab !== 'rejected'` (line ~1578). Review-request line 3 lists 'Action' as a required header for every tab — worth clarifying with product whether Approved/Rejected should now show a read-only Reject/Reopen button in that Action column, or whether the spec just enumerates possible columns and 'no Action for terminal states' remains correct.
Cross-day OT stitching + amber '(+1)' works on all 4 tabs that display OT (Approved / Auto / Manual / Extra) — verified visually with SURENDRA's 20:07→07:59 pair.
Extra-duty live total calc on the Additional Duty tab correctly recomputes 23:52 + 1h → 24:52 in the DOM the instant the input changes (no debounce lag).

success_rate.frontend: 7/8 items PASS end-to-end; item #1 (Pending headers when empty) partial — no crash, empty-state renders but headers not shown.

seed_data_creation: None. Existing SURENDRA SINGH 2026-07-20/21 seeded punches were only READ. Extra-duty input typed to 1 for live-total verification then reset to 0; Save button never pressed on any tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: punch-approvals.tsx common header spec: Code / Name / Father Name / Designation / In / Date / Out / Date / OT In / Date / OT Out / Date / Duty HRS / Total Duty HRS / Update Reason / Action. Action is hidden on approved/rejected. Additional Duty tab replaces Update Reason with Extra Duty ± (HRS/MIN) + Total HRS + Amount ₹ but keeps the new OT In/OT Out columns. Search testIDs: pa-search (TextInput) + pa-search-clear (Pressable). Empty state on Approved/Auto/Manual tabs uses 'No rows match your search' when a search string filters out everything. OT (+1) amber label uses local IST date under the time. Session token: hit POST /api/auth/admin-password-login {email,password}, put returned session_token into localStorage['llc_session_token'].
